quote.message: Pick Up: {{from_address}}. Destination: {{to_address}}. Weight: {{weight}}. Value: {{value}}. Quantity: {{quantity}}. Transport: {{transport}}. Insurance: {{insurance}}. Distance: {{distance}}. Quote Price: {{price}} {{company_name}} - {{web_url}} Call/WhatsApp: {{phone}}

booking_confirmation.message: Your booking #{{order_number}} is confirmed! Pick-up: {{pickup_date}} {{pickup_time}}. Driver will contact you shortly. {{company_name}}

booking_accepted.message: Your booking has been accepted by driver {{driver_name}}. Contact: {{driver_phone}}. Tracking: {{tracking_link}}

delivery_status.message: Your package is {{status}}. Location: {{location}}. Estimated arrival: {{eta}}. {{company_name}}

payment_received.message: Payment of {{amount}} for order {{order_number}} has been received. Thank you! {{company_name}}
